system-combobox-border-color-hover.description:
Defined in `.spectrum`.
Used by `--spectrum-combobox-border-color-hover`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-gray-600)`, if not set.

system-combobox-border-color-focus.description:
Defined in `.spectrum`.
Used by `--spectrum-combobox-border-color-focus`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-gray-800)`, if not set.

system-combobox-border-color-focus-hover.description:
Defined in `.spectrum`.
Used by `--spectrum-combobox-border-color-focus-hover`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-gray-900)`, if not set.

system-combobox-border-color-key-focus.description:
Defined in `.spectrum`.
Used by `--spectrum-combobox-border-color-key-focus`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-gray-800)`, if not set.

system-combobox-readonly-input-border-co.description:
Defined in `.spectrum`.
Used by `--spectrum-combobox-readonly-input-border-color`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-gray-500)`, if not set.

system-combobox-background-color-disable.description:
Defined in `.spectrum`.
Used by `--spectrum-combobox-background-color-disabled`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-gray-25)`, if not set.

system-combobox-border-color-disabled.description:
Defined in `.spectrum`.
Used by `--spectrum-combobox-border-color-disabled`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-disabled-border-color)`, if not set.

highcontrast-combobox-border-color-highl.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-Combobox`.
Used by `--mod-picker-button-border-color`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-combobox-border-color-focus-hover, var(--spectrum-combobox-border-color-focus-hover))`, if not set.

highcontrast-combobox-border-color-inval.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-Combobox`.
Used by `--mod-picker-button-border-color`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-combobox-border-color-invalid-focus-hover, var(--spectrum-combobox-border-color-invalid-focus-hover))`, if not set.

highcontrast-textfield-border-color-inva.description:
Used by `.spectrum-Combobox.is-readOnly.is-invalid:not(.spectrum-Combobox--quiet) .spectrum-Combobox-input:read-only`, `.spectrum-Combobox--quiet .spectrum-Combobox-textfield.is-readOnly.is-invalid > .spectrum-Combobox-input:read-only`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-textfield-border-color-invalid-default, var(--spectrum-combobox-readonly-border-color-invalid-default))`, if not set.

highcontrast-textfield-text-color-disabl.description:
Used by `.spectrum-Combobox.is-readOnly.is-disabled:not(.spectrum-Combobox--quiet) .spectrum-Combobox-input:read-only`, `.spectrum-Combobox--quiet .spectrum-Combobox-textfield.is-readOnly.is-disabled .spectrum-Combobox-input:read-only`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-textfield-text-color-disabled, var(--spectrum-combobox-readonly-text-color-disabled))`, if not set.
